Hero.title: Master Your Loadout
Hero.subtitle: Organize your gear, plan your adventures, conquer the outdoors.

Landing.heroTitle: Organize Your Gear. Conquer the Trail.
Landing.heroSubtitle: The ultimate gear management platform for outdoor enthusiasts. Track every item, build perfect loadouts, and never forget essential gear again.

organize.title: Organize Everything
organize.description: Catalog all your gear with detailed specs, weights, and images. Know exactly what you own.

loadouts.title: Build Smart Loadouts
loadouts.description: Create weight-optimized packing lists for any adventure. See total weight at a glance.

share.title: Share & Discover
share.description: Join a community of outdoor enthusiasts. Share your setups and discover new gear.

testimonial1.quote: GearGraph changed how I organize my hiking gear. No more forgotten items on the trail!
testimonial1.author: Alex M., Thru-Hiker

testimonial2.quote: Finally, a tool that understands the obsession with gear weight. My pack has never been lighter.
testimonial2.author: Sarah K., Ultralight Backpacker

testimonial3.quote: The loadout feature saved me hours of planning before my PCT section hike.
testimonial3.author: Mike R., Weekend Warrior

pricing.title: Simple, Honest Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more.

Auth.registerSubtitle: Start organizing your outdoor gear today
